title: Marketplace Manager - Rivigo South Asia Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rivigo South Asia Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rivigo South Asia Partners family as a Marketplace Manager in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rivigo South Asia Partners:
Rivigo South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo South Asia Partners!
